title: Contoured Cervical Pillow
desc: Tynor Contoured Cervical Pillow is designed to support the head and neck by maintaining proper alignment and promoting a natural sleeping posture

title: Compression Stocking Mid Thigh Classic (Pair)
desc: Tynor Compression Stockings are designed to provide graduated compression that supports venous return, reduces swelling, and improves circulation in the lower limbs

title: Cervical Orthosis (Philadelphia) Ethafoam
desc: Tynor Cervical Orthosis (Philadelphia) is designed to provide complete immobilization and strong support to the cervical spine. It stabilizes the neck and head, restricts unwanted movement, and aids in recovery from serious cervical injuries and post-surgical conditions. Its specialized design also makes it suitable for patients with tracheostomy and burn-related care.

title: Cervical Collar Soft with Support
desc: Tynor Cervical Collar Soft with Support is designed to immobilize and support the cervical region. It restricts unwanted neck movement, stabilizes the head and neck, and provides a structured resting position for the chin, making it suitable for conditions requiring controlled immobilization.

title: Cervical Collar Soft
desc: Tynor Cervical Collar Soft is designed to provide gentle support and stabilization to the neck. It helps protect the cervical spine from sudden jerks and vibrations, making it ideal for mild conditions, daily use, and preventive care.

title: Cervical Collar Hard Adjustable
desc: Tynor Cervical Collar Hard Adjustable is designed to provide strong immobilization and support to the cervical spine. It helps restrict unwanted neck movement, stabilizes the head and neck, and aids in faster recovery from injuries and cervical conditions.

title: Cast Shoe Rocker Sole
desc: Tynor Cast Shoe (Rocker Sole) helps you walk more comfortably and safely with a cast by reducing pressure on the injured foot while supporting natural movement during recovery.

title: Abs Support (Neo)
desc: Abs Support (Neo)

title: Cast Cover Leg
desc: Tynor Cast Cover (Leg) is designed to keep the cast clean and dry during daily activities like bathing or showering. It provides reliable waterproof protection while allowing easy wearing and removal. The lightweight and flexible design ensures comfortable use without restricting movement.

title: Cast Cover arm
desc: Tynor Cast Cover (Arm) keeps your cast clean and dry during daily activities like bathing, using a secure waterproof seal and flexible design for comfortable, worry-free protection.

title: Bunion Splint
desc: Tynor Bunion Splint is designed to correct hallux valgus deformity by guiding the big toe into an improved alignment. It provides controlled correction while allowing natural toe movement, making it suitable for both corrective use and post-operative support.

title: Back Support Belt
desc: Tynor Back Support Belt is designed to provide firm compression and support to the lower back. It helps reduce strain on muscles and ligaments while offering stability during daily activities, prolonged sitting, or physical exertion.

title: Back Rest Full
desc: Tynor Back Rest Full provides ergonomic back support by maintaining the natural spinal curve, relieving back pain, and promoting healthy posture during prolonged sitting.

title: Athletics Support Trunk
desc: Tynor Athletic Supporter (Trunk Type) is designed to provide firm scrotal support, minimize unwanted movement, and enhance stability during high-impact sports and physical activities.

title: Athletics Support Brief
desc: Tynor Athletic Supporter (Brief Type) is designed to provide focused scrotal support, minimize unwanted movement, and enhance stability during high-impact sports and physical activities.

title: Ash Brace (Hyper Extension Brace)
desc: Tynor Ash Brace (Hyper Extension Brace) is expertly designed to immobilize and stabilize the spine in a neutral to hyperextension position. It provides targeted support to the thoracic and lumbar regions, helping correct posture, reduce pain, and promote healing. The ergonomic design ensures effective spinal alignment while maintaining comfort during prolonged use.

title: Arm Sleeve
desc: Tynor Arm Sleeve is designed to provide effective protection against sun exposure, scratches, and minor abrasions during outdoor activities. It offers a comfortable, flexible, and breathable solution for athletes and individuals engaged in prolonged physical or outdoor work.

title: Arch Support Semi Pro (Pair)
desc: Tynor Arch Support Semi Pro is designed to support the natural inner arch of the foot, ensuring proper weight distribution and enhanced stability. It helps relieve foot pain while improving posture and overall walking comfort.

title: Anklet Pair
desc: Tynor Anklet is designed to provide mild compression and reliable support to the ankle during everyday use. It helps improve blood circulation, provides therapeutic warmth, and relieves pain and inflammation. The soft, stretchable design ensures a comfortable fit while supporting natural ankle movement.

title: Anklet Comfeel Pair
desc: Tynor Anklet Comfeel is designed to provide gentle support and comfort for everyday ankle pain, stiffness, or fatigue, along with supreme comfort and softness. It helps improve circulation and provides soothing warmth to reduce discomfort. The soft, stretchable design ensures a snug fit while remaining comfortable for all-day wear inside footwear

title: Ankle Wrap Sleek Elastic
desc: Tynor Ankle Wrap Sleek Elastic is designed to provide light support and stability for everyday ankle discomfort or minor sprains. It helps reduce strain, improve joint control, and support movement during daily activities. The wrap-around design allows a secure fit while staying comfortable inside footwear.

title: Ankle Support Air Pro
desc: Tynor Ankle Support Air Pro is a designer support that provides compression and stability to the ankle joint during sports, athletics, and running. It improves blood circulation and helps reduce the risk of sprains and ankle injuries during activity.

title: Ankle Support (Neo)
desc: Tynor Ankle Support (Neoprene) is designed to provide support and controlled immobilization to the ankle joint. It helps restrict excessive movement, offers compression and warmth, and supports recovery in conditions involving instability or strain.

title: Ankle Brace
desc: Tynor Ankle Brace is designed to provide strong support and stability for injured or weak ankles. It helps control unwanted movements, reduce pain and swelling, and support faster recovery. The structured design with straps and splints keeps the ankle secure while still allowing controlled movement during daily activity.

title: Ankle Splint
desc: Tynor Ankle Splint is designed to provide effective immobilization and stability to the ankle, helping prevent further injury while supporting faster recovery. Its ergonomic design ensures a secure and comfortable fit, reducing pain, swelling, and strain during rehabilitation

title: Ankle Binder Air Pro
desc: Tynor Ankle Binder Air Pro is designed to provide compression and support to the ankle joint, helping maintain stability during sports and physical activities. It enhances circulation around the ankle, which supports mobility and reduces the risk of strain and injury.

title: Ankle Binder
desc: Tynor Ankle Binder provides firm support and effective compression to stabilize the ankle, relieve pain, and reduce swelling. It helps prevent injuries and supports faster recovery, ensuring confident, comfortable movement every day.

title: Air Ankle Splint
desc: Tynor Air Ankle Splint is designed to provide rigid immobilization and superior stability to the ankle during injury recovery. It limits unwanted lateral movement while offering adjustable compression through air pads, helping reduce swelling, inflammation, and pain for faster healing.

title: ADJUSTABLE ROM KNEE BRACE
desc: Tynor Adjustable R.O.M Knee Brace is designed to regulate knee joint movement by allowing controlled flexion, extension, or immobilization within a defined range. It supports rehabilitation by enabling progressive motion while maintaining joint stability.

title: Abdominal Support 9"/23cm
desc: Tynor Abdominal Support is designed to support your core when it needs it the most—after surgery, post-delivery, or during abdominal weakness. It provides firm yet comfortable compression to reduce strain, support movement, and help you get back to your routine with confidence.

title: Abdominal Belt
desc: Tynor Abdominal Belt is designed to help tone and shape the abdominal area, especially after pregnancy. It provides firm compression to support the waistline, improve muscle tone, and help you get back to your pre-pregnancy shape. At the same time, it offers support during recovery from surgery or abdominal weakness.
